2394380.name: Turbo Shell Original Soundtrack
2394380.description:
The Turbo Shell Original Soundtrack by Pete Frogs features 8 high-energy and driving Synthwave tracks, created to enhance the action-packed, retro-futuristic and downright fun experience of the game.

The album features custom endings for the 8 tracks (which cannot be heard in the game) to make for a more unique listening experience.

As a bonus, 3 original tracks composed by Pete Frogs for the Turbo Shell trailers are also included.
Composed, produced, mixed and mastered by Pete Frogs
